summary: Phase 2 & Phase 3 Tax Module Testing Complete - All 25 backend API tests passed, frontend components verified

issues: Tax Meter Card requires scrolling to view - consider placing higher on dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: Metro bundler had cache issues with newly added TaxMeterCard.tsx - resolved by disabling fast resolver
Login form Sign In button requires using data-testid selector for reliable automation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 & 3 Tax Module fully tested. All 7 API endpoints working: /api/tax/meter, /api/tax/documents, /api/tax/capital-gains-v2, /api/tax/deduction-gap, /api/tax/tds-mismatch, /api/tax/calendar, /api/tax/reminders. Frontend components verified: TaxMeterCard on Dashboard, DeductionGapCard, TDSMismatchCard, TaxCalendarCard on Tax screen. Login requires using data-testid='login-submit-btn' selector.

phase_2.tax_meter_endpoint: PASS - Returns proper structure with estimated_tax, tds_paid_ytd, tax_due, refund_expected, better_regime, deduction_80c
phase_2.tax_documents_endpoint: PASS - Returns documents list with count
phase_2.tax_meter_dashboard_widget: PASS - Visible on dashboard after scroll

phase_3.capital_gains_v2_endpoint: PASS - Returns gains with grandfathering support, summary, tax_breakdown, notes
phase_3.deduction_gap_endpoint: PASS - Returns gaps with recommendations, summary with total_gap and potential_tax_savings
phase_3.tds_mismatch_endpoint: PASS - Returns tds_sources with expected vs reported comparison, status
phase_3.tax_calendar_endpoint: PASS - Returns FY events with dates, status (urgent/upcoming/future)
phase_3.tax_reminders_endpoint: PASS - Returns personalized reminders with urgency levels
phase_3.deduction_gap_card_ui: PASS - Shows '5 sections under-utilized' with ₹1.1L potential savings

api_response_samples.tax_meter: estimated_tax, tds_paid_ytd, tax_due, refund_expected, better_regime (old/new), deduction_80c (used/limit/remaining/utilization_pct)
api_response_samples.capital_gains_v2: gains array, summary (stcg_equity, ltcg_equity, ltcg_equity_exemption, ltcg_equity_taxable), tax_breakdown, grandfathering notes
api_response_samples.deduction_gap: gaps array with recommendations, summary (total_gap, potential_tax_savings, sections_analyzed, sections_under_utilized), top_actions
api_response_samples.tds_mismatch: tds_sources array, summary (total_expected_tds, total_reported_tds, overall_difference, status)
api_response_samples.tax_calendar: events array with date, month, day, event, action, is_applicable, status, days_until
api_response_samples.tax_reminders: reminders array with id, type, urgency, title, message
